case_title: NARVAEZ, JULIO A. VS LIMEX TRANSPORTATION ATTN: LIN, DAVID

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $470.30 FILED BY NARVAEZ, JULIO A. AS TO DEFENDANT LIMEX TRANSPORTATION  ATTN: LIN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
